issues.detail: Instructions focus on happy path and lack coverage of error handling and edge cases.
Instructions are specific to TypeScript, limiting applicability to other supported languages.

scenarios.name: Durable order workflow surviving restarts during a 2-hour wait
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses setTimeout and ad-hoc Redis state; treatment uses proxyActivities with startToCloseTimeout/retry plus workflow sleep so Temporal resumes after crashes.

scenarios.name: Start a workflow from an API and observe status and result
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to BullMQ; treatment uses Client.workflow.start with taskQueue/workflowId/args and handle.describe()/handle.result() as documented.
